display.product_title: All-Clad G5 Graphite Core Stainless-Steel Fry Pan with Lid, 12 inch
display.disclosure_sentence: No third-party certification found; material family is identified, but the exact stainless steel grade/spec is not fully disclosed.
display.product_description: All-Clad’s G5 cooking surface is stainless steel — an inert metal with no nonstick coating and no PFAS. Under the PAC Safety Score methodology, stainless steel carries very low plastic-associated chemical exposure concern, even under high-heat cooking. That is why this pan earns one of the highest scores in cookware. The exact steel grade is not fully published, which is reflected in the Documentation Incomplete badge, but it does not materially change the low PAC exposure concern.

secondary_materials.name: Graphite core
secondary_materials.note: Internal bonded core — not a food-contact surface.
